basic_details.job_title: WDCW Kurnool Ayah Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: Women Development and Child Welfare Department Kurnool
basic_details.short_information: Women Development and Child Welfare Department Kurnool (WDCW Kurnool) Recruitment 2026: Women Development and Child Welfare Department Kurnool has released the official notification for 2 Ayah posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 25 years Maximum Age: 42 years Age Relaxation: 5 years for SC, ST, BC and PWD candidates

qualification.education_qualification: Experience of taking care of infants and children below 6 years
qualification.details: Experience of taking care of infants and children below 6 years (Physical fitness certificate required)

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: http://kurnool.ap.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: WDCW Kurnool Ayah Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the WDCW Kurnool Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download WDCW Kurnool Ayah Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.event: Last Date for Submission of Application

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: http://kurnool.ap.gov.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: WDCW Kurnool Ayah Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Ayah post in WDCW Kurnool?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Ayah post in the Women Development and Child Welfare Department Kurnool is 15th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Ayah position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Ayah position will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 7944.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for the Ayah post?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit is 25 years, and the maximum age limit is 42 years for the Ayah post.

faq.question: Q4. Are there any age relaxations for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, there is an age relaxation of 5 years for SC, ST, BC, and PWD candidates.

faq.question: Q5. What is the required qualification for the Ayah post?
faq.answer: The primary qualification is experience in taking care of infants and children below 6 years, along with a physical fitness certificate.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Ayah post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Ayah post in the Women Development and Child Welfare Department Kurnool.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their applications by post.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for applying to this post?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the Ayah recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process primarily involves Document Verification.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of the Women Development and Child Welfare Department Kurnool, which is http://kurnool.ap.gov.in.
